programmes.show_description: ...Taking Down the Shoplifting Gangs. Police collate intelligence from 23 police forces while investigating a man linked to organised crime, potentially connected to £78,000 in thefts.

The youngsters visit the zoo where they are shown around by zookeepers Mr Lion, Mrs Crocodile and Mr Giraffe.

The Kangaroos take Peppa and her family to the beach on their second day in Australia, where they try surfing for the first time.
After the disappearance of Mrs Fotheringill, the twins have had no playgroup to attend. Queen Thistle becomes their new teacher.

Mike and Charlie are looking for the rare spotted ray, when they lose control and the boat begins sinking. Quick!

programmes.show_description: Hotel owner Fede and his wife, who are turning 40, challenge manager Angel to throw them a party, complete with glitz, glamour and an Elvis impersonator.

programmes.show_description: Restaurant Manager Pepe is challenged by Hotel Manager Angel to revamp his weekly Gala Dinner, and it's 80s party time at Club Tropicana for singer and DJ Jessie.

programmes.show_description: Tracy Borman tells the story of the woman some claim brought down Anne Boleyn: her sister-in-law - Jane Boleyn - one of the most influential women in Henry VIII's court.

Paddington wishes he could have been at Mr and Mrs Brown's wedding after seeing some photos, so they decide to stage it all again.

The Ruff-Ruff Pack take a bus on a wild jump and the pups must rescue the baddies off the Twisty Top Mesa.

Peppa and her family win a trip to America. Miss Rabbit flies them to New York, where they meet a new Miss Rabbit.

It's Dinoween night, but Tia is scared of the dark.
Stan finds a special star stone which Grandad believes will bring him luck - and it does! But when Stan loses his star stone, will his luck change?
Mayor Humdinger's kitties make off with Mayor Goodway's book delivery truck.

Holly, Ben and their friends find a broken toy robot. Holly fixes it with magic, but it is trying to clean out the whole castle.
Peppa's Circus: When Grandpa Pig puts up a tent in his garden, Peppa and her friends put on a circus.

programmes.show_name: New: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programmes.show_description: Drink driving features in this edition. An HGV driver with an open bottle of lager is pulled up, and a motorcyclist admits drinking three beers before his trip!
A gang of masked men exit a cloned car being tracked by cops. Intel suggests they're here to rob a cannabis factory and police must approach with extreme caution.
Access-all-areas documentary following police at work in real time. A unit is dispatched to search for a woman who has threatened to take her own life.
